name: Haru Black Kami Scalp Shampoo 2-Pack
pros: 100% natural ingredients and amino acid formula appeal to eco-conscious users
All-in-one shampoo eliminating need for conditioner simplifies hair routine
Two-pack at ¥6,500 (¥3,250 per bottle) offers solid value for premium natural product
cons: Zero Rakuten reviews on this listing raises red flags about actual product demand or recent listing
Limited third-party validation makes it difficult for foreigners to assess real effectiveness
shortDescription: Natural amino acid shampoo in a budget-friendly two-pack.
review: Haru's Black Kami Scalp Shampoo emphasizes natural, silicone-free ingredients at a reasonable price—ideal for minimalist routines. However, the complete absence of Rakuten reviews on this listing is unusual and concerning; it may be a new posting, incorrect SKU, or low sales volume. Without user feedback, foreigners should approach with caution or source reviews from other Japanese retailers before committing.
